samples.xml_description:
<module id="freq_div">
    <description>A frequency divider for dividing the input clock frequency by 2, 10, and 100.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="CLK_in">Input clock signal.</input>
        <input id="RST">Reset signal.</input>
        <output id="CLK_50">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 2.</output>
        <output id="CLK_10">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 10.</output>
        <output id="CLK_1">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 100.</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>
        // Counter for generating CLK_50
        reg [1:0] cnt_50;
        always @(posedge CLK_in or posedge RST) begin
            if (RST) begin
                cnt_50 <= 2'd0;
            end else begin
                cnt_50 <= ~cnt_50;
            end
        end
        
        // Counter for generating CLK_10
        reg [2:0] cnt_10;
        always @(posedge CLK_in or posedge RST) begin
            if (RST) begin
                cnt_10 <= 3'd0;
            end else if (cnt_10 == 3'd4) begin
                cnt_10 <= 3'd0;
            end else begin
                cnt_10 <= cnt_10 + 3'd1;
            end
        end
        
        // Counter for generating CLK_1
        reg [6:0] cnt_100;
        always @(posedge CLK_in or posedge RST) begin
            if (RST) begin
                cnt_100 <= 7'd0;
            end else if (cnt_100 == 7'd49) begin
                cnt_100 <= 7'd0;
            end else begin
                cnt_100 <= cnt_100 + 7'd1;
            end
        end
        
        // Assigning output clocks based on counters
        assign CLK_50 = cnt_50[1];
        assign CLK_10 = cnt_10[2];
        assign CLK_1 = cnt_100[6];
    </implementation>
</module>
